tagline: the board changes. the quality doesn't.

items.name: Rahmsschnitzel
items.description: Pork schnitzel in a velvety cream and paprika sauce, served with Spätzle.

items.name: Schnitzel Sandwich
items.description: House schnitzel on a toasted kaiser with garlic aioli, pickles, and shredded cabbage.

items.name: Schnitzel Platter for Two
items.description: Two schnitzels of your choice, four sides, a pretzel, and one bottle of Helles to share.

items.name: Sonntagsbraten
items.description: Sunday roast — slow-braised pork belly with roasted root vegetables and dark beer gravy.
